tasks.title: Add MuiPaper outlined variant with token colours
tasks.description: In web/src/theme.ts, extend the existing MuiPaper component config (currently only styleOverrides.root = { backgroundImage: 'none' }) with a `variants` array containing one entry: props { variant: 'outlined' }, style { backgroundColor: 'var(--surface)', color: 'var(--ink)', borderColor: 'var(--line)' }. This mirrors the existing MuiChip/MuiButton token-restatement pattern so background, text, and border all flip together under prefers-color-scheme:dark and match the ledger surfaces. Add a short comment explaining why (same rationale as the MuiChip variants note: palette is light-mode-only so tokens must be restated to flip). Keep the existing root backgroundImage override intact.

tasks.title: Verify types and build
tasks.description: Run `cd web && npx tsc --noEmit` to confirm the variants entry type-checks against MUI's PaperProps, then `cd web && npm run build` to confirm the production bundle builds cleanly. Fix any type errors (e.g. ensure the variants prop shape matches what MUI expects for MuiPaper).
